infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Sentinel needs location access to stream your position to your parent in real time.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Sentinel needs background location access to stream your position even when the app is minimized.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Sentinel needs motion sensor access to detect anomalies in your movement patterns.
